implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

matchedGroups.title: Restaurant detail page and menu-section state
requiredBehaviors: Section toggles update immediately and independently.
Menu-item counts update immediately in visible UI state.
riskHints: Do not hide the cart action behind repository-only counts because the source uses local visible counts.
Share is a visible affordance but currently no-op in source; preserve the affordance even if still non-functional.
acceptanceEvidence: Detail store test verifies expansion and cart-visibility logic.
uiContracts: back, like, and share actions in the header
three expandable menu sections with animated arrow rotation
floating cart action only when item counts are non-zero
dataContracts: selected restaurant comes from session repository
menu and liked state come from detail store composition

matchedGroups.title: Cart page sections and local editor states
requiredBehaviors: Cart renders snapshot data in the same order as source sections.
Note/coupon field edits update immediately without requiring repository round-trips.
riskHints: Avoid inventing checkout or persistence flows that do not exist in source.
Bill and delivery are source placeholders; keep them visible but do not over-model them as real backend state.
acceptanceEvidence: Cart page composes item, coupon, delivery, and bill sections with the expected visible conditions.
uiContracts: item-note editor and coupon field update locally
delivery and bill sections remain visible below items
dataContracts: cart snapshot comes from session repository
delivery restaurant and bill total are currently hard-coded UI content in source

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
